title: teline canariensis
intro: Teline canariensis, also known as Canary Island broom or Spanish broom, is a flowering shrub native to the Canary Islands and the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Teline canariensis include its ability to improve digestive health, reduce anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Teline canariensis can be found in the form of tea, capsules, and infusions, and are often used to treat issues such as insomnia, menstrual cramps, and skin problems.
